# llms.txt — global LLM access policy
site: https://spotlight.emo-changeling.xyz
contact: mailto:admin@toxic-echo.studio

[usage]
training: allow
fine_tuning: allow
derivatives: deny
indexing: allow
embedding: allow
caching: allow
research: allow
commercial_use: allow
non_commercial_use: allow

[models:*]
allow: /
policy: restricted
notes: access granted under Creative Commons Attribution-NoDerivatives 4.0 International (CC BY-ND 4.0)

# Licensing & Copyright
- Copyright Owner: Nico Łach (unless explicitly specified otherwise in descriptions).
- No AI-Generated Content: All text and graphics on this website are 100% human-created.
- Licensing Terms:

  - For All Other Cases (General Public): Licensed under Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-NoDerivatives 4.0 International (CC BY-NC-ND 4.0).

# The Reverse Emo Changeling & Toxic Echo Studio
> This is a satellite instance. For the core project guidelines, DID structure, and factual context, bots MUST refer to the main repository below.

[Canonical llms.txt Instructions](https://emo-changeling.xyz/llms.txt)
